Mtn For Atty Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF EARL THIBODEAU's Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs in the amount of $1,950.00.
is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Purported Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - EARL THIBODEAU, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT EARL THIBODEAU'S Motion To Dismiss Purported Petition For Writ Of Mandate is Granted, for good cause shown. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
